infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Borjie uses the camera to capture weighbridge plates, drill-hole photos, and shift-report evidence.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Borjie uses the microphone to record voice notes on shift reports and incident logs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Borjie uses your location to log drill-hole GPS, attendance check-in fences, and geo-tagged photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Borjie uses photos for evidence attached to shift reports and incidents.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Borjie uses biometric sign-off to confirm letters and acknowledgements.

plugins.cameraPermission: Borjie uses the camera to capture mining evidence.

plugins.photosPermission: Borjie attaches photos to shift reports and incidents.
